title: Pumpkin and Peppery Croissant Strata
description: A layered breakfast dish featuring the flaky goodness of croissants, the warmth of pumpkin, and the spiciness of peppery goodness.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, pumpkin puree, salt, and black pepper.
3. In a separate bowl, tear the croissant pieces into small bits.
4. In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of croissant bits.
5. Pour half of the egg mixture over the croissant layer.
6. Sprinkle with half of the peppery cheese.
7. Repeat the layers, starting with the croissant bits, then the remaining egg mixture, and finally the remaining cheese.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the strata is golden brown and set.
9. Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
